response.text:

rationale: Your SoC (43%) remains below our minimum threshold (50%), network-wide stress is critical with r2c3 in survival mode, and all peers are rejecting shares—outbound energy transfer would compromise our own autonomy and violates mandatory survival margin preservation.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.5, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Network-wide SoC stress; r2c3 at critical 28% SoC with 1.24h autonomy. All peers rejecting shares due to own low reserves. Survival margin preservation mandatory. Zero outbound sharing until SoC recovery or grid reconnection. Monitor r1c3, r2c2, r2c4 for escalation signals..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
